result:
共有 **70** 個 `.c` 檔案直接 `#include "server.h"`，全部位於 `src/` 目錄下（未出現在 `modules/`、`deps/` 或其他路徑，也沒有被註解掉的假陽性）：

```
src/acl.c              src/gcra.c              src/rdb.c
src/aof.c              src/hotkeys.c           src/redis-check-aof.c
src/bio.c              src/hyperloglog.c       src/redis-check-rdb.c
src/bitops.c           src/iothread.c          src/replication.c
src/blocked.c          src/keymeta.c           src/resp_parser.c
src/call_reply.c       src/latency.c           src/rio.c
src/childinfo.c        src/lazyfree.c          src/script.c
src/cluster.c          src/logreqres.c         src/script_lua.c
src/cluster_asm.c      src/lolwut.c            src/sentinel.c
src/cluster_legacy.c   src/lolwut5.c           src/server.c
src/commands.c         src/lolwut6.c           src/slowlog.c
src/config.c           src/lolwut8.c           src/socket.c
src/connection.c       src/memory_prefetch.c   src/sort.c
src/crc16.c            src/module.c            src/sparkline.c
src/db.c               src/multi.c             src/sparsearray.c
src/debug.c            src/networking.c        src/syncio.c
src/defrag.c           src/notify.c            src/t_array.c
src/entry.c            src/object.c            src/t_hash.c
src/estore.c           src/pubsub.c            src/t_list.c
src/eval.c             src/t_set.c             src/t_stream.c
src/evict.c            src/t_string.c          src/t_zset.c
src/expire.c           src/threads_mngr.c      src/timeout.c
src/fwtree.c           src/tls.c               src/tracking.c
                                                src/unix.c
```

方法說明：這是純文字性的「哪些檔案含有某行 include」問題，不是符號定義/引用查找，所以直接用 `grep -rl '#include "server.h"' --include='*.c'` 更可靠；並額外核對了：無重複 include、無註解掉的假陽性、`modules/` 與 `deps/` 下無此 include。
